column7: Knight Statue adjacent to Inquisitor on the board provides a significant damage multiplier to the Inquisitor. Effect is positional — must be directly adjacent.
column9: Inquisitor shows elevated damage numbers when Knight Statue is adjacent. Buff animation visible on Inquisitor.
column12: Knight Statue must occupy a cell directly adjacent (horizontal or vertical) to an Inquisitor

column7: Harlequin can copy Engineer units, accelerating chain formation. Copied Engineers count toward the chain bonus.
column9: Additional Engineers appear faster on board; chain glow visible sooner
